critic_notes: Five Allgemeiner Client questions. Q002/Q004/Q005 pass cleanly. Q001 (A42 Cloud- und Online-Funktionen) and Q003 (A1 Authentisierung) flag for non-contiguous splicing: the quote concatenates two sentences from the source while omitting an intermediate sentence, without marking the join with ` • `. Each concatenated sentence IS verbatim in the source — the factual claims and correct answers are supported — but the rubric requires every fragment between ` • ` to be a single verbatim substring. Generator should have split these with ` • ` or included the intermediate sentence.

issues.detail: Fragment `Es DÜRFEN NUR zwingend notwendige Cloud- und Online-Funktion...` — non-contiguous sentences (each traces to source but intermediate text was omitted without ` • ` separator).
Fragment `Um den Client zu nutzen, MÜSSEN sich die Benutzenden gegenüb...` — non-contiguous sentences (each traces to source but intermediate text was omitted without ` • ` separator).
